defaultProjects.name: Lease Accounting 6.x
defaultProjects.jql: project in (NFS) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: FOS, Sync Bot & User Aux
defaultProjects.jql: project in (FCO) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: SAP Posting Bot
defaultProjects.jql: project in (INC) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status DESC, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: General Ledger
defaultProjects.jql: project in (GL) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status desc, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: Fixed Asset Accounting
defaultProjects.jql: project in (FAA) AND issuetype in (Enhancement, Epic) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC" asc, status desc, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: Procure To Pay
defaultProjects.jql: project in (P2P) AND issuetype in (Enhancement) ORDER BY "Scope Commitment At SC", status desc, Priority DESC

defaultProjects.name: Open Bugs (All Projects)
defaultProjects.jql: project in (NFS, GL, FCO, FAA, INC, P2P) AND issuetype = Bug AND status not in (QA, PQA, "Pending DEP", "EOA Pending", Closed, Done, Resolved, Cancelled, "Won't Fix") ORDER BY priority DESC, created DESC
